Game-Time Effect on Pitchers: Headwind: balls into the air will be knocked down → helps pitchers.
Game-Time Effect on Hitters: Headwind: balls in the air won’t carry → hinders hitters.

Game-Time Effect on Pitchers: Tailwind: fly balls may carry farther → can hurt pitchers.
Game-Time Effect on Hitters: Tailwind: fly balls likely to carry → helps hitters.
